mapper.select:
SELECT NL.NUM_ID, NL.CAR_NO, NL.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, NL.NUM_ST, TO_CHAR(NL.ISSUE_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS ISSUE_DT FROM TM_NUMPLATE_LIST NL, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE NL.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID(+)
AND NL.COMPANY_ID = #{COMPANY_ID}
AND NL.CAR_NO LIKE '%' || #{CAR_NO} || '%'
ORDER BY NL.ISSUE_DT DESC
